comment.body:
"Market is still rangebounding. 
Listen,
European leaders fear being sidelined as the U.S. and Russia conduct their own private discussions on ceasefire terms and territorial concessions, effectively excluding Ukraine and key NATO allies from the most consequential talks.
Trump Will pull out senior U.S. envoys from the public peace talks, signaling a formal disengagement. 
Despite rhetorical gestures toward ceasefires, Russian forces have pressed on with offensive operations, capturing territory and sustaining civilian impacts, which underscores the continuing momentum of the war.
Moscow expects minimal pushback and little meaningful enforcement of any truce. 
Remember to Donald Trump’s prior threats to abandon peace efforts without immediate results… "impatience" - as I said.
European nations fear they will be left to shoulder the financial costs of reconstruction, security guarantees, and refugee resettlement without significant U.S. support.
So the conflict risks further escalation.
EU has chosen an intellectual cover for a militarized order sacrifizing diplomacy and universal values for a zero-sum paradigm, risking cycles of war and instability."
Alma
